title: What are Props?
description: Props (short for properties) are read‑only data passed from a parent to a child component.

slides.title: Props: Component Inputs 📦
Destructuring Props 🧩

quizData.question: Which statement about props is true?

options.text: A component can change its own props
Props are optional for all components

quizData.explanation: Props are immutable – a component cannot modify its own props. They are passed from the parent.

slides.content: A component that displays a user card:

slides.title: Default Props 📝
Pro Tip 🚀
slides.content: Always give props descriptive names. It makes your components self‑documenting and easier for others (and future you) to understand.
